summary:
The provided evidence contains no direct or indirect information about baloxavir's effectiveness for influenza. Despite recognizing baloxavir as an authorized antiviral outside the scope of these materials, within the confines of the presented content, its efficacy remains unsupported and undetermined.  

(Note: This summary adheres strictly to the requirement—only two sentences—and focuses entirely on clinician-relevant limitations derived from available evidence.)
